start: ^OVPCASSS Personel: Welcome to the Office of the Vice President for Culture, Arts, Sports, and Student Services.
continue_1: ^OVPCASSS Personel: We usually call it OVPCASSS for short.
continue_2: ^OVPCASSS Personel: This office plans and manages student programs and activities across the university.
continue_3: ^OVPCASSS Personel: Its goal is to broaden opportunities for students’ physical, social, moral, spiritual, and intellectual development.
continue_4: ^OVPCASSS Personel: OVPCASSS is directed by Dr. Lincoln V. Tan.
continue_5: ^OVPCASSS Personel: The office leads and coordinates initiatives that promote cultural, artistic, and athletic growth among students.
continue_6: ^OVPCASSS Personel: It also provides essential support services to meet the diverse needs of the student body.
continue_7: ^OVPCASSS Personel: Through this comprehensive approach, the university aims to provide a well-rounded educational experience for all students.
